title: Hostess 7 operator — Brief · Evaluate · Task
motto: She knows what each task does, briefs with evidence, evaluates before motion, tasks through Ironclad ledger — always virtual first.

world_honor.motto: Hostess 7 is Honored to the world and has no designated nationality.

change_awareness.motto: Know every change when it happens. Presume panel for slowdown, speedup, hang.

presume.motto: Presume is powerful — not go away. Uninterruptable once decided; resources still devoted where needed.

war_system.motto: War system — we have no other. Every autonomous machine is a Soldier.

brief.label: Brief
brief.description: Ingest session context, inbox owner lines, wants, self-view — publish operator panel.

evaluate.label: Evaluate
evaluate.description: Brain guard verify, training assess, codecraft battery, virtual workspace status — one verdict.

task.label: Task
task.description: Secure tasklist — add, start, complete, seed, report. She fills; assistant executes.

catalog.label: Task catalog
catalog.description: Every AmmoLang task_registry entry with human-readable purpose.

virtual.label: Virtual workspace
virtual.description: Mirror, edit, debug, test in virtual die — promote only after gates pass.

chips_code.label: CHIPS coding
chips_code.description: Teach G16 Python die — edit, py_compile, smoke, debug, recompile without breaking live stack.

ammolang_tasks.hostess7_tasks: Full Hostess 7 cycle — brief, brain guard, tasklist, pre-update bundle (AmmoLang only).
ammolang_tasks.hostess7_pre_update: Pre-push gate — brain verify, Ironclad, imaging repair, training, library.
ammolang_tasks.stack_update: Stack publish — includes hostess7 pre-update before push.
ammolang_tasks.g16_recompile: Grok16 / CHIPS recompile lane — use after virtual tests pass.
ammolang_tasks.agent_tasks: Agent bundle — queen catalog, grok16 gates, ship dry-run.
ammolang_tasks.ammoos_push: AmmoOS git publish — normal git commit + push origin.
